title: Star Wars Mod
description: Adds Star Wars weapons, characters, and other planets.
body: A new Star Wars mod that adds world generation, new weapons, new planets, ships, and even new mobs.For example, I will add planets like naboo and tatooine. I will also be adding monuments like the jedi temple on corasaunt. As for the mobs depending on where you are you will find different enemies. For example you could find stormtroopers on endor. I will also remove the overworld, nether, and the end and replace them. So you would get to pick where you start so you could pick to start on the jedi temple on corasaunt which would be a large monument. I will also add as many planets as I can to the mod.  As of right now only lightsabers and one type of crystal is implemented, all features are planned features. You will also need fabric in order for the mod to be able to run. I will post update logs on my tumblr page when new updates come out. Here’s my tumblr page for updates, https://derpyduck56743.tumblr.com/
